meaning: n.猴绠(一种粗毛,竖耳,有猴状表情的欧洲小宠物)
examples: Have you ever seen an affenpinscher running across the quad of an Ivy League school?
The affenpinscher with the monkeylike face shakes his oversized head so hard, he sometimes loses his balance.
The little dogs have their own club, The Affenpinscher Club of America.
